prestazioni: Engine swap to a Lotus-tuned 2.0L Z20LET (from the Astra VXR) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (88mm, 8.8:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) on a custom tubular manifold (Tial 44mm external wastegate) for 380whp on 98 RON fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing sequential fueling and individual cylinder trims.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB LSD (Lotus Elise-spec) with 3.94:1 final drive ratio, upgraded driveshafts (GKN CV joints with 300M steel shafts), and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity) mated to a lightened flywheel (10.5kg, CNC-machined from 7075-T6 aluminum).

Suspension overhaul: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with polybushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushes, spherical rear toe links) and Eibach 300lb/in front / 250lb/in rear springs. Add a Lotus Elise-spec front sway bar (22mm, adjustable) and a custom rear sway bar (19mm, 3-position) from WhiteLine Racing.
estetica: Carbon fiber widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny VX220 kit (Pandem-style, 50mm front / 70mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave) and a 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap with satin clear coat. Front splitter and rear diffuser from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece adjustable).

Lightweight wheel setup: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT (17x8.5 ET35 front, 17x9.5 ET35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/17 front, 265/40/17 rear). Brake system upgrade: AP Racing CP6640 front calipers (4-piston, 330mm discs) and CP5310 rear calipers (2-piston, 280mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines.

Interior weight reduction: Full Lotus Elise S2-style carbon fiber interior (dashboard, door cards, center console) from TMI Autotech, paired with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm, suede). Add a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in) from Custom Cages UK with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 2kg agent).
